title: New Level
description: This Resource Pack replaces the old and boring Roman numerals with more intuitive colored level icons
body:
**Languages: English Україньська**
This Resource Pack replaces the old and boring Roman numerals with more intuitive colored level icons: enchanted books, potions, and effects. Currently available in 2 languages: English and Ukrainian.
This Resource Pack was invented in 20 minutes and implemented in 20 minutes, I saw the idea in Resource Pack [Icons](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/icons), but I didn't like the colors and execution, so I decided to make my own Resource Pack.




**If you see a red background in the Resource Pack selection menu, you can just ignore it. The Resource Pack will still work**

![REPLACE ME WITH YOUR ALT TEXT](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/zlQDL9gs/images/73e02420095e7ebc46c8c60a942a776c0875e62a.png)
